title: Russian-Style Chickpea Pancakes
description: A delicious and crispy pancake recipe made with chickpea flour and a hint of Russian flair.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together chickpea flour and salt.
Gradually add in water and stir until smooth.
Add in silky tofu and stir until combined.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add in fry onion and stir until translucent.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop batter into pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until bubbles appear on surface.
Flip and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes or until golden brown.
